title: Counter-Tune the Fork
prompt: Match the repeating cutter pulse before the cold loop overheats.
success_message: The cutter, suit ground, and operator loop lock into phase.
failure_hint: The signals beat against each other and the cold loop climbs. Adjust the sweep, coolant, and ground phase.

title: Harmonic Choir Lock
prompt: Hold Nova's heartbeat against the Chorus without flattening the other voices.
success_message: The Chorus keeps its separate voices and turns with Nova instead of against her.
failure_hint: The note is too solitary. Keep the heartbeat steady, but leave room for the others.
